On June 15, 1215, King John of England aggressively and heavily affixed his absolute royal seal to the incredibly massive, historically defining *Magna Carta* at Runnymede. This absolute, foundational legal document heavily forced the reigning monarch to officially recognize that the absolute power of the king was heavily subject to the rule of law. It fundamentally and aggressively established massive, absolute civil liberties, including the profound right to a fair trial, heavily laying the massive, architectural groundwork for modern Western constitutional democracy.

On June 15, 1752, Benjamin Franklin aggressively achieved a massive, world-altering scientific milestone. During a massive thunderstorm in Philadelphia, he heavily executed his incredibly famous, highly dangerous "kite experiment." By aggressively capturing ambient electrical charge in a Leyden jar utilizing a wet hemp string and a metal key, he absolutely and heavily proved the massive, fundamental connection between lightning and electricity, fundamentally revolutionizing the massive, global understanding of atmospheric physics and electromagnetism.
